steps: Dissect the gland cells of the third instar larvae in 0 mM Ca 2+ HL-3 solution and plate on poly-L-Lysine-coating coverslip.
Bath the cells in 4 μM Fluo-4 AM (Invitrogen)/100 mM Ca 2+ /HL-3 solution to be loaded with Fluo-4 AM dye.
Capture the images every 10 min during dye loading using MetaMorph software and ANDOR iXon 897 camera.
Incubate the cells in 4 μM Fluo-4 AM (Invitrogen)/100 mM Ca 2+ /100 mM LaCl 3 /HL-3 solution.
Capture the images every 10 min during dye loading using MetaMorph software and ANDOR iXon 897 camera.
Count the fluorescence intensity in the salivary gland cells and surrounding cover slips.

Calculate final fluorescence value by subtracting fluorescence intensity in the gland cells from the dye fluorescence intensity in the coverslips. The fluorescence intensity of one salivary gland was used for each data value. Image processing was achieved using Image J and LSM Zen.
creator: Chi-Kuang Yao
